Document:
# Community Goals
[color=cyan]Community Goals[/color] are [bold]server-wide objectives[/bold] that all players can work toward together. Goals are set by administrators and may span multiple rounds, encouraging collective effort to meet shared milestones.
## Community Goals Terminal
The [color=lime]Community Goals Terminal[/color] displays all currently active goals and lets you contribute items toward them. Open it by clicking on it with an empty hand.
## How to Contribute
Each goal has one or more [bold]requirements[/bold] - specific items needed to reach completion. Each requirement shows a [color=cyan]progress bar[/color] indicating how much has been contributed so far across the entire server.
### Staging Items
To contribute an item, [bold]click on the terminal while holding the item[/bold] in your active hand. If the item matches any active requirement, it will be placed into the [color=lime]staging area[/color] on the right side of the window. The staging area holds up to [color=cyan]20 item stacks[/color] at a time.
### Contributing
Once items are staged, you have two options:
- [bold]Contribute All[/bold] - Donates every staged item toward all matching requirements at once. - [bold]Contribute[/bold] (per requirement) - Donates only the staged items that match that specific requirement.
Contributed items are consumed and their quantities are permanently recorded toward the goal.
### Retrieving Items
Changed your mind? Press [bold]Return Items[/bold] to eject all staged items back onto the floor.
## Tips
- Goals may have a limited active window across rounds, so check the terminal regularly and contribute while you can! - Progress is [bold]shared across the entire server[/bold], every player's contribution counts toward the same total.
